excerpt: Policy Dec 18, 2025 Project Vend: Phase two In June, we revealed that we’d set up a small shop in our San Francisco office lunchroom, run by an AI shopkeeper. It was part of Project Vend, a free-form experiment exploring how well AIs could do on complex, real-world tasks. How has Claude's business been since we last wrote?

excerpt: Alignment Feb 3, 2025 Constitutional Classifiers: Defending against universal jailbreaks These classifiers filter the overwhelming majority of jailbreaks while maintaining practical deployment. A prototype withstood over 3,000 hours of red teaming with no universal jailbreak discovered.
